# Curriculum Design: Progressive Exploration v55

## Stages
### Stage 1: Dry-dock
- Difficulty: 0.29
- Focus: navigation
- Success threshold: 0.51
### Stage 2: Garden
- Difficulty: 0.39
- Focus: crafting
- Success threshold: 0.62
### Stage 3: Archives
- Difficulty: 0.90
- Focus: crafting
- Success threshold: 0.87
### Stage 4: Garden
- Difficulty: 0.26
- Focus: negotiation
- Success threshold: 0.58

## Advancement Rule
Progress when success rate > threshold for 9 consecutive episodes.
